1.name: Obtain
1.exit: inventory artifact exists, station/file mapping known, schema inconsistencies documented

2.name: Scrub
2.exit: cleaned datasets reproducible, QA/QC artifacts exist, imputation policy encoded

3.name: Explore
3.exit: notebook runs on cleaned data, exploratory summaries exist

4.name: Model: Reference + FWI
4.exit: Stanhope cache exists, moisture codes reproducible, validation artifacts exist

decisions.summary: Use OSEMN as project framing, not a software framework
Bias toward assignment compliance with sane internal structure
Use both PCA and clustering for redundancy analysis
Implement full FWI chain if data supports it
Treat local cached data as canonical
Enforce hard line length 80, style target 50
Enforce McCabe hard cap 15, target less than 10
Native Python FWI implementation remains the target approach
Spec-driven: test suite replaces task list, Ralph derives tasks from specs
Ralph writes tests first (TDD), implementation follows
Tick-tock adversarial validation: Ralph builds, UnRalph reviews, different models
Acceptance criteria are human-defined constraints anchored to specific methods
Phase 5-6 reset: weak implementations (heuristic clustering, no real KDE) must be redone
